perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a gray ROOTS hoodie and a brown cap sits on a red sofa, holding an iPhone and a pair of AirPods, gesturing while speaking. (2) The camera switches to a close-up of the iPhone screen showing a music player; a hand swipes down to open the Control Center and taps the audio output icon. (3) The screen displays the 'Share Audio' prompt; a second pair of AirPods in a blue case is brought near the phone. (4) The screen confirms two pairs of AirPods are connected and shows independent volume sliders for each. (5) The shot returns to the man on the sofa who continues talking excitedly with the phone and headphones in hand.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic male voice begins speaking immediately in Mandarin. Upbeat, lo-fi background music with a steady beat starts simultaneously. (2) The vocal remains continuous and instructional as faint digital 'click' sound effects occur during screen interactions. (3) The background music maintains its tempo until the video ends, with the speaker's tone remaining enthusiastic throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '出國' (Going abroad) - Hook text to set the scenario. (2) '都戴AirPods Pro' (All wearing AirPods Pro) - Functional description of the situation. (3) '右下角往下滑' (Swipe down from top right) - Instructional text for UI navigation. (4) '共享音訊' (Share Audio) - Functional text identifying the feature. (5) '一起聽韓團哦' (Listen to K-pop groups together) - Emotional hook/closing remark.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (male) appearing on screen and performing the hand demo.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male with glasses, wearing a brown newsboy cap and a gray hooded sweatshirt with 'ROOTS' text.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A red sofa against a large window overlooking high-rise residential buildings.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate the 'Audio Sharing' feature of iOS, specifically how to connect two pairs of AirPods to a single iPhone for shared listening experiences while traveling or with friends.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator demonstrates specific Apple ecosystem features using branded hardware (iPhone, AirPods) and wears visible brand-name apparel (Roots).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-talking instructional style, signature newsboy cap, and social media handles (3ctim) visible in corners.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical short-form tech tip content optimized for social media engagement with heavy use of captions and direct address to camera.
